G' : StructureGroupoid H'
e e' : PartialHomeomorph M H

x : M
Q : (H → H) → Set H → H → Prop
hG : G.LocalInvariantProp G' P

he : e ∈ maximalAtlas M G
xe : x ∈ e.source
⊢ ContinuousWithinAt g s x ∧
      P (↑(chartAt H' (g x)) ∘ g ∘ ↑(chartAt H x).symm)
        ((chartAt H x).target ∩ ↑(chartAt H x).symm ⁻¹' (s ∩ g ⁻¹' (chartAt H' (g x)).source)) (↑(chartAt H x) x) ↔
    ContinuousWithinAt (g ∘ ↑e.symm) (↑e.symm ⁻¹' s) (↑e x) ∧
      P (↑(chartAt H' ((g ∘ ↑e.symm) (↑e x))) ∘ (g ∘ ↑e.symm) ∘ ↑(chartAt H (↑e x)).symm)
        ((chartAt H (↑e x)).target ∩
          ↑(chartAt H (↑e x)).symm ⁻¹' (↑e.symm ⁻¹' s ∩ g ∘ ↑e.symm ⁻¹' (chartAt H' ((g ∘ ↑e.symm) (↑e x))).source))
        (↑(chartAt H (↑e x)) (↑e x))
